examples: The evidence isn't even strong enough to have triggered an active search for Tyche;
Because they envision a more benign orbit, they prefer the name "Tyche" (the good sister).
In Greek mythology, Tyche was usually invoked along with Nemesis, the goddess of bad luck.
Whitmire notes that Sedna, thought by some to be an inner Oort Cloud object, may have also been perturbed by Tyche, since Sedna has an orbit well beyond that of Neptune.
